revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: '<div class="pathnavbox"> * {{Pathnav|文化|マスメディア|出版|出版物|逐次刊行物|新聞|新聞記事}} * {{Pathnav|日本|日本の文化|日本の...'
revision.text:
* {{Pathnav|文化|マスメディア|出版|出版物|逐次刊行物|新聞|新聞記事}} * {{Pathnav|日本|日本の文化|日本のメディア|日本の新聞|日本経済新聞社}}
[[日本経済新聞]]の[[記事]]に関するカテゴリ。 {{DEFAULTSORT:にほんけいさいしんふんのきし}} [[Category:新聞記事]] [[Category:日本経済新聞社|きし]]

* {{Pathnav|文化|マスメディア|出版|出版物|逐次刊行物|新聞|新聞記事|日本の新聞記事}} * {{Pathnav|日本|日本の文化|日本のメディア|日本の新聞|日本経済新聞社}}
[[日本経済新聞]]の[[記事]]に関するカテゴリ。 {{DEFAULTSORT:にほんけいさいしんふんのきし}} [[Category:日本の新聞記事]] [[Category:日本経済新聞社|きし]]

revision.comment: [[Special:Diff/85363522#pathnavboxクラスのテンプレート移行|Bot作業依頼]]: [[MediaWiki‐ノート:Common.css#特定テンプレート用のCSSをTemplateStylesに移行する提案（8回目）|pathnavboxクラスのテンプレート移行]] (insource:/class=[" ]*pathnavbox/) - [[User:Cewbot/log/20190913|log]]
Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata
revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories]] [[ja:Category:日本経済新聞の記事]]
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[Category:私の履歴書の登場人物]].

revision.comment: Text replacement - "Wikidata links on [[Category:" to "Wikidata links on [[:Category:"

revision.comment: Bot: mark ja import issue

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:Ja import failed]]" to "{{translated page|ja|{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}|comment=category history here}}"
revision.text: [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[category:Tier 2 Categories]][[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[ja:Category:日本経済新聞の記事]] This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[:Category:私の履歴書の登場人物]]. revision.comment: Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "{{DEFAULTSORT:" to "[[Category:Categories to be renamed]]{{citation needed|"
Immanuelle moved page [[Category:日本経済新聞の記事]] to [[Category:Articles in The Nikkei]]: Merge [[Category:日本経済新聞の記事]] into [[Category:Articles in The Nikkei]] via bot
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== {{Pathnavbox| * {{Pathnav|文化|マスメディア|出版|出版物|逐次刊行物|新聞|新聞記事|日本の新聞記事}} * {{Pathnav|日本|日本の文化|日本のメディア|日本の新聞|日本経済新聞社}} }} [[日本経済新聞]]の[[記事]]に関するカテゴリ。
{{citation needed|にほんけいさいしんふんのきし}}
==Old Content==
.
==Categories==
{{translated page|ja|Category:日本経済新聞の記事|comment=category history here}} {{translated page|ja|Category:日本経済新聞の記事|version=85418820}} [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories to be renamed]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Nikkei Inc.]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories]] [[Category:Works originally published in Japanese newspapers]] [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories to be renamed]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Nikkei Inc.]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories]] [[Category:Works originally published in Japanese newspapers]] [[ja:Category:日本経済新聞の記事]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:私の履歴書の登場人物]]

revision.comment: Bot: replace with clean JA/Local structure
Text replacement - "{{DEFAULTSORT:" to "{{citation needed|"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q9680358)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[ja:"
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[Ja:"
Text replacement - "{{wikidata link|" to "[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata]]{{Wikidata link|"
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata"

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]]"
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "qq"
Text replacement - "categories missing wikidata" to "qq"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Text replacement - "[[Ja:" to "[[ja:"
Text replacement - "ategories missing wikidata" to "qq"
Text replacement - "{{Wikidata link|" to "{{wikidata link|"
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories in Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but actually having wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Cqq]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Removing from [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{Pathnavbox|
* {{Pathnav|文化|マスメディア|出版|出版物|逐次刊行物|新聞|新聞記事|日本の新聞記事}}
* {{Pathnav|日本|日本の文化|日本のメディア|日本の新聞|日本経済新聞社}}
}}
{{citation needed|にほんけいさいしんふんのきし}}

{{translated page|ja|Category:日本経済新聞の記事|version=85418820}}
{{wikidata link|Q9680358}}

[[ja:Category:日本経済新聞の記事]]

[[Category:Tier 2 Categories]]
